raw_text: andrés santana suárez date of birth 25/12/1992 address calle joaquín maría lópez, 7b, madrid 28015. phone number 616269674. email andressotana@gmail.com work experience expert in fiber maintenance, vodafone 11/2016-06/2017 beneficiary of the scholarship vodafone yu new talent. analysing fiber network (hfc) state to generate preventive work and making reports. electronic engineer. eiit 06/2017-present designing test benches to integrate aeronautical equipment such a simulation computers (autocad electrical). generation of documents for continuity and functionality test. bus tester (serial bus, 1553 bus or arinc429) academics achievements bachelor in electronics and automatic engineering 2011 2016 escuela de ingenierias industriales, universidad de extremadura. 240 credits ects. maritime electronic engineering 2014 2015 gdynia maritime university, poland. erasmus + program. additional formation english speaking course, level b1, 40 hours. english course british council accredited, level c1, 80h c programing course at universidad de extremadura, 40h html5, css3 and javascript course mooc course, 40h projects control of traffic lights using microcontroller stm32f4 using can bus connections to create a net of traffics lights and control them by using a microcontroller. low voltage installation design for a car dealing company using the software dmelect to design all the installation. languages spanish native. english fluid. c1 french basics. a2 software and programing languages high autocad, pspice, microsoft office, c, verilog intermediate dmelect, revit, java, javascript
